issues: Missing recommendation_block field - must be a single formatted string with all 8 sections (header, title, scores, recommended, confidence, signals, why, footer)
CSV code is 'APPLY' but must be a 2-letter resume code: AI|SWE|EE|WD
recommendation object should be converted to formatted recommendation_block string matching apply.md specification
message:
Please fix the following issues and rewrite 006-output.json:
1. Format recommendation object into a single recommendation_block string with all 8 sections
2. Change CSV code from 'APPLY' to 'AI' (the top_resume from recommendation)
3. Add resume_code field with value 'AI'
4. Keep recommendation_block format exactly as specified in apply.md with header/footer separators, keyword scores, recommended resume line, confidence, top 3 signals, and why explanation
